examples: Abruptly he turned the ignition key and started the engine.
The device automatically disconnects the ignition when the engine is switched off.
"Would your car be easy to steal?"—"Fat chance. I've got a device that shuts down the petrol and ignition."
RelayRides, Zipcar and City CarShare all disable the ignition through security measures, he says.
Borrowers get a card that unlocks the car and activates a device to start the ignition.
